name: Chicken in Saffron Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken with salt and pepper, then brown it on all sides in butter. Sprinkle with thyme and add the bay leaf, saffron, and cream. Stir in the tomato paste until smooth.
2. Cover the skillet and simmer for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the chicken is tender. Taste the sauce for seasoning and add more salt and pepper if necessary.
